'''DD-11A''', or '''DeDe''', was a [[Tendrando Arms]] [[Defender Droid]] owned by [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] to protect her daughter, [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]]. A modified [[YVH 1]] combat [[Droid/Legends|droid]], DeDe was made to be a nanny and bodyguard droid for Allana. She had weapon arms, a [[Synthskin/Legends|synthskin]] torso, and a "cherubic" face.

DeDe helped defend Solo when the [[Gorog]] tried to [[Attempted assassination of Allana Solo|assassinate]] her.

DeDe was later destroyed after attempting to stop the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] from hurting the young [[Chume'da]].
